    andThen(QuadConsumer) - Method in interface dev.chojo.aether.common.consumer.QuadConsumer
    Returns a composed QuadConsumer that performs, in sequence, this operation followed by the after operation.
    andThen(TriConsumer) - Method in interface dev.chojo.aether.common.consumer.TriConsumer
    Returns a composed TriConsumer that performs, in sequence, this operation followed by the after operation.
    andThen(Function) - Method in interface dev.chojo.aether.common.functions.QuadFunction
    Returns a composed function that first applies this function to its input, and then applies the after function to the result.
    andThen(Function) - Method in interface dev.chojo.aether.common.functions.TriFunction
    Returns a composed function that first applies this function to its input, and then applies the after function to the result.

    dev.chojo.aether.common - module dev.chojo.aether.common
     
    dev.chojo.aether.common.completion - package dev.chojo.aether.common.completion
    Classes for command completion.
    dev.chojo.aether.common.consumer - package dev.chojo.aether.common.consumer
    Functional interfaces for consumers with multiple arguments or throwing checked exceptions.
    dev.chojo.aether.common.container - package dev.chojo.aether.common.container
    Container classes for storing related values.
    dev.chojo.aether.common.eventmanager - package dev.chojo.aether.common.eventmanager
    Event management for intercepting and handling events.
    dev.chojo.aether.common.functions - package dev.chojo.aether.common.functions
    Functional interfaces for functions with multiple arguments or throwing checked exceptions.
    dev.chojo.aether.common.provider - package dev.chojo.aether.common.provider
    Provider interfaces for accessing data.
    dev.chojo.aether.common.util - package dev.chojo.aether.common.util
     
    dev.chojo.aether.commonweb - module dev.chojo.aether.commonweb
     
    dev.chojo.aether.commonweb.error - package dev.chojo.aether.commonweb.error
    Error handling and exception classes for web-related operations.
    dev.chojo.aether.commonweb.util - package dev.chojo.aether.commonweb.util
    Web-related utility classes.
    dev.chojo.aether.discordoauth - module dev.chojo.aether.discordoauth
     
    dev.chojo.aether.discordoauth.configuration - package dev.chojo.aether.discordoauth.configuration
    Configuration classes for Discord OAuth authentication.
    dev.chojo.aether.discordoauth.pojo - package dev.chojo.aether.discordoauth.pojo
    Plain Old Java Objects (POJOs) for Discord OAuth data structures.
    dev.chojo.aether.discordoauth.service - package dev.chojo.aether.discordoauth.service
    Services for handling Discord OAuth authentication and API interaction.
    dev.chojo.aether.kofi - module dev.chojo.aether.kofi
     
    dev.chojo.aether.kofi.configuration - package dev.chojo.aether.kofi.configuration
    Configuration classes for Ko-fi integration.
    dev.chojo.aether.kofi.exception - package dev.chojo.aether.kofi.exception
    Exceptions specific to Ko-fi integration.
    dev.chojo.aether.kofi.pojo - package dev.chojo.aether.kofi.pojo
    Data structures representing Ko-fi transactions and items.
    dev.chojo.aether.kofi.service - package dev.chojo.aether.kofi.service
    Service for interacting with the Ko-fi API and webhooks.
    dev.chojo.aether.mailing - module dev.chojo.aether.mailing
     
    dev.chojo.aether.mailing - package dev.chojo.aether.mailing
    Main package for mailing functionality.
    dev.chojo.aether.mailing.configuration - package dev.chojo.aether.mailing.configuration
    Configuration for mail settings and services.
    dev.chojo.aether.mailing.entities - package dev.chojo.aether.mailing.entities
    Entity classes representing mails, sources, and results.
    dev.chojo.aether.mailing.service - package dev.chojo.aether.mailing.service
    Core services for mail management and delivery.
    dev.chojo.aether.mailing.util - package dev.chojo.aether.mailing.util
    Utilities for mailing operations like retries and functional interfaces.
    dev.chojo.aether.supporter - module dev.chojo.aether.supporter
     
    dev.chojo.aether.supporter.access - package dev.chojo.aether.supporter.access
    Classes for managing user subscriptions and access levels.
    dev.chojo.aether.supporter.configuration - package dev.chojo.aether.supporter.configuration
    General configuration for the supporter module.
    dev.chojo.aether.supporter.configuration.modules - package dev.chojo.aether.supporter.configuration.modules
    Sub-modules for specific supporter configurations.
    dev.chojo.aether.supporter.configuration.modules.dummy - package dev.chojo.aether.supporter.configuration.modules.dummy
    Dummy configuration classes for testing or placeholders.
    dev.chojo.aether.supporter.configuration.modules.feature - package dev.chojo.aether.supporter.configuration.modules.feature
    Configuration for feature-based access control.
    dev.chojo.aether.supporter.configuration.modules.subscriptions - package dev.chojo.aether.supporter.configuration.modules.subscriptions
    Configuration related to subscription keys and management.
    dev.chojo.aether.supporter.configuration.modules.subscriptions.platform - package dev.chojo.aether.supporter.configuration.modules.subscriptions.platform
    Platform-specific subscription configurations.
    dev.chojo.aether.supporter.configuration.modules.subscriptions.platform.purchase - package dev.chojo.aether.supporter.configuration.modules.subscriptions.platform.purchase
    Data structures for platform-specific purchases.
    dev.chojo.aether.supporter.jackson - package dev.chojo.aether.supporter.jackson
    Jackson-specific configuration and modules for serialization.
    dev.chojo.aether.supporter.registry - package dev.chojo.aether.supporter.registry
    Registry for managing supporter-related keys and services.
    dev.chojo.aether.supporter.service - package dev.chojo.aether.supporter.service
    Core services for supporter management and middleware.
    dev.chojo.aether.supporter.service.context - package dev.chojo.aether.supporter.service.context
    Context and validation classes for supporter access checks.
